title: Department of Radio, Television and Cinema - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Radio, Television and Cinema - Message from the Head of the Department

The Radio, TV and Cinema department of Esenyurt University,  aims to be useful to students with courses and applied studies prepared with the current and advanced theoretical and methodological approaches. Our main duty as Radio Tv and Cinema department with the industry-experienced academic staff is to raise democratic graduates with developed communication skills, who are committed to Atatürk's principles and reforms.  After taking theoretical courses in the first two years, the students of our department continue with applied courses in the last two years. Our graduates  can work in TV and film sets  in priority and also can work in different fields of media sector such as  screenwriters, directors, editors, cameramen, cinematographers, program producers, editors. In addition, fort he students who want to set an academic goal for themselves, our academic staff give  detailed guidance.

This content was updated on 15/09/2024.
